sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6311" key="a)naggeltiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναγγ-ελτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n6311.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of expressing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δυνάμεις τινὸς ἀ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Prm. (Rh.Mus.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.613</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
